data.title: Alaska Air Group to webcast Q4 2025 financial results conference call; includes Alaska Airlines, Hawaiian Airlines, and Horizon Air. Scheduled at 11:30 a.m. EST/8:30 a.m. PST.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Alaska Air Group Inc. will host its quarterly conference call at 11:30 a.m. EST/8:30 a.m. PST to review the financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025. Alaska Air Group Inc. is the holding company for Alaska Airlines Inc., Hawaiian Airlines, Inc., and Horizon Air Industries Inc. This call will provide insights into the recent financial results, with stakeholders and investors eagerly awaiting the details. The conference call will be a pivotal moment for the company, consolidating the performance data and setting the tone for future strategies and initiatives.

data.title: Richard A. Rosenbaum of Greenberg Traurig inducted into Lawdragon Hall of Fame for leadership and real estate. 5 others join top lawyers list in 2026.
data.description: Five additional attorneys from Greenberg Traurig have been included in the 2026 Leading Lawyers list. Richard A. Rosenbaum, the Executive Chairman of the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP, has been honored by being inducted into the prestigious Lawdragon Hall of Fame for his exceptional achievements and continued contributions to the legal field.

data.title: n-Lorem and EspeRare collaborate to expand access to ASO therapies for rare genetic diseases in Europe.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in San Diego and Geneva, the n-Lorem Foundation and the EspeRare Foundation disclosed a new partnership aimed at enhancing accessibility in Europe to n-Lorem's antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) treatments for individuals suffering from rare genetic disorders. This collaboration will focus on increasing the reach of these therapies to benefit a larger number of patients in need.

data.title: Catalight and Frontera team up to enhance autism care, aiming to lower costs and enhance quality.
data.description: Today in Denver and Walnut Creek, California, Catalight and Frontera Health disclosed a new strategic partnership to address challenges faced by the autism industry. With escalating costs and varying quality of care, the collaboration will grant access to Frontera's technology through Catalight's provider network. This initiative aims to enhance services for individuals with autism by leveraging the strengths of both companies.

data.title: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals plans to establish leadership in transthyretin diseases by 2030, aiming for top revenue in TTR market.
data.description: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Inc. revealed their new roadmap, "Alnylam 2030," which focuses on expanding operations over the next five years. Following the successful completion of their previous P5x25 plan, the company is now aiming to establish strong global leadership in transthyretin (TTR) diseases. By 2030, they aim to lead the TTR market in revenue and cumulatively over the next five years. Alnylam has a history of meeting or surpassing their long-term goals, which sets the stage for this next phase of growth. The strategy outlines a commitment to scaling operations and achieving significant milestones in the TTR market. For more details, visit a finance news platform.

data.title: Pürblack warns consumers of counterfeit shilajit products prioritizing taste, urges for real efficacy.
data.description: A significant number of shilajit products place more emphasis on flavor rather than effectiveness according to Pürblack. The company advises consumers to be critical of marketing assertions and to seek actual results from supplements. Pürblack, a wellness company renowned for its scientific approach, encourages individuals to prioritize efficacy over taste in their product selections. This message was delivered on January 12, 2026, in San Diego, highlighting the importance of scrutinizing claims and demanding tangible benefits from health supplements.

data.title: Lenovo unveils 2026 new Chromebooks for education at FETC and Bett UK, focusing on edtech innovation and student safety.
data.description: Lenovo™ unveiled its latest education solutions at the Future of Education Technology Conference® in Morrisville, N.C. The company introduced new Chromebook devices for teaching and learning in 2026. Along with these additions, Lenovo will showcase its educational portfolio at Bett UK 2026 from January 21-23. The focus will be on engaging with education leaders worldwide to discuss topics such as AI literacy, safety, device repairability, and more. These innovations aim to enhance the learning experience for students and educators, highlighting advancements in technology for education.

data.title: XiFin Inc. expands its CareALERTS technology for pharmacies, alerting pharmacists to vaccination opportunities within their workflow.
data.description: In San Diego, XiFin, Inc., a prominent revenue cycle management (RCM) company integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into billing solutions, unveiled the enhancement of its CareALERTS™ smart clinical messaging technology. This expansion now includes a pharmacy-centric feature designed to notify pharmacists of patient-specific vaccination chances within their usual workflows. Receiving real-time immunization alerts during patient consultations, the CareALERTS for Pharmacy initiative aims to seamlessly integrate these opportunities into pharmacy operations.

data.title: Cemex named to CDP's 2025 “A List” for climate action, among global leaders for environmental performance.
data.description: In Monterrey, Mexico, Cemex has received a prestigious honor by being listed on CDP's 2025 "A List" for climate action, which is the top recognition given by the environmental disclosure platform. This acknowledgment showcases Cemex's significant efforts in corporate transparency and performance related to climate issues, placing them in an exclusive category of leading companies globally. By providing top-notch data, recognizing climate-related risks and opportunities, and implementing concrete measures, Cemex has solidified its position as a frontrunner in the drive towards decarbonization.

data.title: The Soraya's Jazz at Naz Festival celebrates 5th anniversary on Jan. 31 with 7 events; Tickets from $46, livestream from $19.99.
data.description: A series of seven events will take place from January 31 to February 21, featuring the fifth annual Jazz at Naz festival. The festival kicks off with the performance of Sacredness under the direction of a Musical Director who has been nominated for the 2026 GRAMMY® awards. Ticket prices for the events start at $46, while Livestream Passes are available starting at $19.99. The festival will be held at The Soraya in Los Angeles, with more information about the schedule and performers accessible on the event website.

data.title: Anti-American sentiment is damaging US brands abroad, with hostility surging 5-10x. 62% of global marketers affected, sales prospects at risk.
data.description: There has been a significant increase in hostility by 5 to 10 times, leading to a negative impact on sales prospects abroad for American firms, as reported by 62% of global marketers. The trend of anti-American sentiment is expected to persist in the future. Despite this, brands have the opportunity to mitigate this anger by adopting a strategy of "respectful partnership." This approach could potentially help in managing the growing challenges posed by the hostile environment.

data.title: Fabentech gets approval for Ricimed®, antidote for ricin poisoning. New treatment option.
data.description: In Lyon, France, Fabentech, a biopharmaceutical company, has received Marketing Authorization for Ricimed®, a treatment for ricin poisoning, one of the most toxic natural substances. This antidote serves as a new therapeutic option alongside supportive care, particularly in severe cases necessitating immediate intervention. This announcement marks a significant milestone in the field of medical countermeasures, granting access to a crucial treatment for individuals affected by ricin poisoning.

data.title: Apple plans to use Google's Gemini to power AI models after its own 'Apple Intelligence' falters, marking a new direction.
data.description: Apple has announced that its future AI models will be developed using Google's Gemini technology, following the failure of its own in-house AI efforts to keep up. This move comes as a significant shift towards enhancing their AI capabilities, with the aim of staying competitive in the market. The decision highlights Apple's commitment to innovation and adapting to emerging technologies in the AI space. This transition represents a strategic decision by Apple to leverage Google's expertise in AI development, reflecting the company's focus on improving its AI models. The collaboration with Google's Gemini is expected to bring cutting-edge advancements to Apple's AI technologies, ultimately enhancing user experience and performance.

data.title: Alliant University rebrands to prepare next-gen professionals for impact. New logo & name reflect growth. San Diego, Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: Alliant University in San Diego revealed its updated brand on January 12, 2026, showcasing the institution's growth and dedication to shaping future purpose-driven professionals. The evolution includes changes to the name, logo, and visual identity, signifying a fresh phase for Alliant. This update reflects the university's commitment to preparing the next generation of professionals.

data.title: Nvidia partners with 2 biotech firms to revolutionize drug discovery through AI.
data.description: Two biotech firms have joined forces with Nvidia in a collaboration aimed at revolutionizing drug discovery and manufacturing with the help of artificial intelligence (AI). This partnership marks a significant shift in the approach to developing life-saving medications. The announcement underscores Nvidia's commitment to advancing healthcare innovation through strategic alliances.

data.title: BioAge's shares surged after positive results for a cardiovascular disease treatment, potentially competing with Eli Lilly.
data.description: Shares of BioAge surged on Monday following positive results for the company's treatment for cardiovascular diseases, potentially positioning it as a competitor to Eli Lilly. The promising news has led to a significant boost in BioAge's stocks, indicating investor confidence in the company's future prospects. The emergence of BioAge as a potential rival to Eli Lilly's offerings in the healthcare sector has generated interest among stakeholders and industry analysts alike. This development underscores the firm's growing presence in the market, with its shares experiencing a notable increase in value. The positive reception to BioAge's cardiovascular treatment signals a significant opportunity for the company to expand its market share and compete with established players in the industry.

data.title: Amazon and Meta underperformed in 2025 but may rally in 2026 per analysts, being top picks.
data.description: Analysts have noted that Amazon and Meta showed lower performance compared to the S&P 500 in the previous year. Despite this, they predict a potential rally for both companies in 2026. The stocks of Amazon and Meta are under scrutiny for their underperforming trend in 2025 but are tipped as top picks by an analyst for the upcoming year.

data.title: Beam stock rose by almost 30% after FDA approved gene-editing drug BEAM-302, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: On Monday, Beam's stock saw a significant increase following the company's agreement with the FDA for its gene-editing drug BEAM-302. The stock surged by almost 30%, reflecting investor confidence in the company's ambitious gene-editing plan that has received approval from the FDA. This positive development signals potential growth for Beam in the market.

data.title: S&P 500 nuclear component Vistra advances post Meta deal announcement, driving up stocks.
data.description: A major component of the S&P 500 index, Vistra, saw further gains on Monday following the announcement of a deal involving Meta Platforms on Friday. The company, known for its presence in the nuclear industry, has shown continued advancement since the deal was disclosed. This trend highlights the positive momentum for Vistra in the market amid the recent significant development with Meta Platforms.
